heading: Incorporation of digital collections into educational curricula
label: 184 Incorporation of digital collections into educational curricula
notes: CodificationSection is from the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2006.

children.heading: Short title
children.label: a Short title
children.text: This section may be cited as the “Library of Congress Digital Collections and Educational Curricula Act of 2005”.

children.heading: Program
children.label: b Program
children.text: The Librarian of Congress shall administer a program to teach educators and librarians how to incorporate the digital collections of the Library of Congress into educational curricula.
establish an educational consortium to support the program; and
make funds appropriated for the program available to consortium members, educational institutions, and libraries.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out this section for fiscal year 2006 and each fiscal year thereafter.
